description: Colombian drug trafficking organization named by the DEA, led by Ramón Quintero Sanclemente and Duffay Gutiérrez. It was a rival of the Cali Cartel and operated primarily in the Valle del Cauca region. The group was involved in cocaine trafficking, money laundering, and other crimes. It was dismantled around 2012.

country_links.evidence_quote: ‘RQ’ hacía constantes viajes a Venezuela, así como a Ecuador, para evadir el cerco...
country_links.context: The organization's leader made constant trips to Ecuador to evade authorities.

country_links.evidence_quote: hace constantes viajes a Panamá y San Andrés.
country_links.context: The organization's leader makes constant trips to Panama.

country_links.evidence_quote: Regiones activas: Colombia . , Estados Unidos . , Europa . , Centroamérica . , Sudamérica . , África . , Asia .
country_links.context: The Cartel de Buga is active in the United States, as indicated by its inclusion in the infobox's active regions.

country_links.evidence_quote: Quintero por la amistad que tuvo con el capo Varela fue la persona que envío a emisarios a reclamar su cadáver en Mérida, Venezuela.
country_links.context: The organization sent emissaries to claim a body in Venezuela, and its leader made constant trips there.
